title: Google Just Dropped The Singularity Bomb
summary: A YouTube video commentary discussing Demis Hassabis's claim that humanity is in the foothills of the singularity, citing examples of AI agents handling coding, research, and scientific discovery tasks. The video argues that imperfect but capable AI is already accelerating real workflows across multiple domains.
